approach: [Partner Name], I noticed Mongio & Associates specializes in IRS problem resolution—that's a unique and valuable niche. They're compliant again, but do they have a plan to rebuild wealth and avoid ending up back in the same position? The ones who succeed long-term have two things: a great CPA (to keep them compliant) and a wealth advisor (to help them rebuild smart). I'm wondering if there's a fit to collaborate—not on the tax resolution side (that's your expertise), but on the 'what comes next' side for clients you've helped turn around. Worth a conversation?
